addedLines: - claude: Catch-all for any task that doesn't fit a more specific agent. FleetView's default when no agent name is typed. (Tools: *)

- Explore: Read-only search agent for broad fan-out searches — when answering means sweeping many files, directories, or naming conventions and you only need the conclusion, not the file dumps. It reads excerpts rather than whole files, so it locates code; it doesn't review or audit it. Specify search breadth: "medium" for moderate exploration, "very thorough" for multiple locations and naming conventions. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)

- general-purpose: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you. (Tools: *)

- Plan: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs. (Tools: All tools except Agent, Artifact, ExitPlanMode, Edit, Write, NotebookEdit)
- statusline-setup: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting. (Tools: Read, Edit)

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

ifeq (${PREFIX},)
	PREFIX=/usr
endif
sharedir = $(PREFIX)/share
libexecdir = $(PREFIX)/lib

ifeq (${builddir},)
	builddir=build
endif

all: ibus-engine-rime

ibus-engine-rime:
	mkdir -p $(builddir)
	(cd $(builddir); cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR=$(sharedir) -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR=$(libexecdir) .. && make)
	@echo ':)'

ibus-engine-rime-static:
	mkdir -p $(builddir)
	(cd $(builddir); cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR=$(sharedir) -DCMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR=$(libexecdir) -DBUILD_STATIC=ON .. && make)
	@echo ':)'

install:
	(cd $(builddir); make install)

uninstall:
	(cd $(builddir); xargs rm < install_manifest.txt)

clean:
	if  [ -e $(builddir) ]; then rm -R $(builddir); fi

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(ibus-rime)

set(ibus_rime_version 1.6.1)

option(BUILD_STATIC "Build Rime using static libraries" OFF)

include(GNUInstallDirs)

set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake)

include(${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/FindPkgConfig.cmake)
pkg_check_modules(IBus REQUIRED ibus-1.0)
if(IBus_FOUND)
  include_directories(${IBus_INCLUDE_DIRS})
  link_directories(${IBus_LIBRARY_DIRS})
endif(IBus_FOUND)

pkg_check_modules(LIBNOTIFY REQUIRED libnotify)
if (LIBNOTIFY_FOUND)
  include_directories(${LIBNOTIFY_INCLUDE_DIRS})
  link_directories(${LIBNOTIFY_LIBRARY_DIRS})
endif(LIBNOTIFY_FOUND)

find_package(Rime REQUIRED)
if(Rime_FOUND)
  include_directories(${Rime_INCLUDE_DIR})
endif(Rime_FOUND)

if(NOT DEFINED RIME_DATA_DIR)
  find_package(RimeData REQUIRED)
endif(NOT DEFINED RIME_DATA_DIR)
message(STATUS "Precompiler macro RIME_DATA_DIR is set to \"${RIME_DATA_DIR}\"")
add_definitions(-DRIME_DATA_DIR="${RIME_DATA_DIR}")

set(ibus_rime_icons_dir "${CMAKE_INSTALL_FULL_DATADIR}/ibus-rime/icons")
configure_file(
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/rime_config.h.in"
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/rime_config.h"
  @ONLY)

include_directories("${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}")

if(BUILD_STATIC)
  find_package(ICU REQUIRED uc)
  if(ICU_FOUND)
    set(RIME_DEPS ${RIME_DEPS} ${ICU_LIBRARIES})
  endif()

  link_directories(${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/lib)
  set(RIME_DEPS ${RIME_DEPS} m stdc++ pthread
      libboost_filesystem.a libboost_locale.a libboost_regex.a libboost_signals.a libboost_system.a libboost_thread.a
      libglog.a libleveldb.a libmarisa.a libopencc.a libyaml-cpp.a)
endif(BUILD_STATIC)

aux_source_directory(. IBUS_RIME_SRC)
add_executable(ibus-engine-rime ${IBUS_RIME_SRC})
target_link_libraries(ibus-engine-rime ${IBus_LIBRARIES} ${LIBNOTIFY_LIBRARIES} ${Rime_LIBRARIES} ${RIME_DEPS})

configure_file(
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/rime.xml.in"
  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/rime.xml"
  @ONLY)

install(FILES "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/rime.xml" DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR}/ibus/component")
install(TARGETS ibus-engine-rime DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR}/ibus-rime")
install(DIRECTORY icons DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR}/ibus-rime" FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.png")
install(FILES ibus_rime.yaml DESTINATION "${RIME_DATA_DIR}")

# Author: Marguerite Su <i@marguerite.su>
# License: GPL
# Description: find Rime schema collection package.
# RIME_DATA_FOUND - System has rime-data package
# RIME_DATA_DIR - rime-data absolute path

set(RIME_DATA_FIND_DIR "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/rime-data"
                       "${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}/share/rime/data"
                       "/usr/share/rime-data"
                       "/usr/share/rime/data")

set(RIME_DATA_FOUND FALSE)

foreach(_RIME_DATA_DIR ${RIME_DATA_FIND_DIR})
    if (IS_DIRECTORY ${_RIME_DATA_DIR})
        set(RIME_DATA_FOUND True)
        set(RIME_DATA_DIR ${_RIME_DATA_DIR})
    endif (IS_DIRECTORY ${_RIME_DATA_DIR})
endforeach(_RIME_DATA_DIR)

include(FindPackageHandleStandardArgs)
find_package_handle_standard_args(RimeData DEFAULT_MSG RIME_DATA_DIR)
mark_as_advanced(RIME_DATA_DIR)

file.content:
#!/bin/bash

basedir=$(dirname $(realpath $0))

src=$1
ver=$2
if [[ -z "$src" || -z "$ver" ]]; then
  echo "usage: `basename $0` path version"
  exit 1
fi

pkg=$(basename $(realpath "$src"))
echo "pkg=$pkg"

if [[ "$pkg" =~ .*rime ]]; then
  tag=rime-${ver}
else
  tag=$pkg-${ver}
fi
echo "tag=$tag"

(cd $src ; git archive --format=tar.gz --prefix=$pkg/ $tag > $basedir/${pkg}-${ver}.tar.gz) || exit 1

echo 'built:'
ls $basedir/${pkg}-${ver}.tar.gz

#!/bin/bash

export BOOST_ROOT=$HOME/code/boost_1_55_0
export LIBRARY_PATH=$BOOST_ROOT/stage/lib

cd $(dirname $0)/..

if [ ! -e librime -a -e ../librime ]; then ln -s ../librime; fi
if [ ! -e brise -a -e ../brise ]; then ln -s ../brise; fi

if [ ! -e lib ]; then ln -s librime/thirdparty/lib; fi
if [ ! -e lib/libyaml-cpp.a ]; then (echo 'building rime depends...'; cd librime; make thirdparty) || exit 1; fi

PKGDIR=$(pwd)/pkg
mkdir -p $PKGDIR

echo 'building rime...'
(cd librime; make librime-static && make -C build-static DESTDIR=$PKGDIR install) || exit 1

echo 'building brise...'
PATH=$PKGDIR/usr/bin:$PATH
(cd brise; make && make DESTDIR=$PKGDIR install) || exit 1

echo 'building ibus-rime...'
make clean && make ibus-engine-rime-static && make DESTDIR=$PKGDIR install || exit 1

install -m 755 package/binpkg-install $PKGDIR/INSTALL
echo 'binpkg built:' $PKGDIR

I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me summarize what I've learned:

**Project: ibus-rime** — Rime Input Method Engine for Linux/IBus

This is a relatively small C project that acts as a frontend/bridge between IBus (the Linux input method framework) and librime (the Rime input method engine core library). It's a "glue" project.

**Key files:**

1. **rime_main.c** — Program entry point (`main`). Sets up signal handlers, gets the librime API, connects to IBus bus, creates an IBus factory, registers the Rime engine type, sets up libnotify notifications, initializes/deployes Rime, and enters `ibus_main()` loop.

2. **rime_engine.c / rime_engine.h** — The core IBus engine implementation. A GObject (IBusRimeEngine) subclass of IBusEngine. Handles:
   - Session management (create/destroy Rime sessions)
   - Key event processing (`process_key_event`)
   - Lifecycle callbacks (focus_in/out, enable/disable, reset)
   - UI updates: preedit text, auxiliary text, candidate lookup table
   - Status bar properties (InputMode/中文, Deploy/部署, Sync/同步)
   - Property activation handlers (deploy, sync, toggle ascii)
   - Candidate clicked, page up/down

3. **rime_settings.c / rime_settings.h** — Loads settings from `ibus_rime.yaml` via librime's config API. Manages: embed_preedit, preedit_style (composition/preview), cursor_type (insert/select), lookup_table_orientation, color schemes (aqua/azure/ink/luna).

4. **rime_config.h.in** — Template for compile-time constants (version, icons dir, shared data dir).

5. **rime.xml.in** — IBus component descriptor (engine registration).

6. **ibus_rime.yaml** — Default user-facing config (style settings).

7. **CMakeLists.txt** — Build configuration. Dependencies: ibus-1.0, libnotify, Rime, RimeData. Optional BUILD_STATIC for static linking.

8. **Makefile** — Wrapper around cmake build.

9. **cmake/FindRimeData.cmake** — Locate rime-data directory.

10. **package/** scripts for building binary packages (static build).

11. **librime, plum** — Git submodules (the Rime engine core and the schema/data manager).

**Architecture understanding:**
- ibus-rime is a **frontend** in the Rime ecosystem. It's the IBus-specific adapter.
- The core engine logic lives in `librime` (a separate project, here as submodule). ibus-rime calls librime's `RimeApi` (a struct of function pointers) to manage sessions, process keys, get commit/context/status.
- IBus provides the GUI/system integration (candidate window, preedit, status bar). ibus-rime translates between librime's data structures and IBus's UI primitives.

**Core data flow:**
1. User types → IBus sends key event → `ibus_rime_engine_process_key_event`
2. → `rime_api->process_key(session_id, keyval, modifiers)`
3. → `ibus_rime_engine_update()` which pulls `RimeStatus`, `RimeCommit`, `RimeContext` from librime
4. → translates to IBus: `ibus_engine_commit_text`, `ibus_engine_update_preedit_text`, `ibus_engine_update_lookup_table`, etc.

- Unit 1: 项目概览与运行
  - L1: 项目定位与生态 (what is ibus-rime, Rime ecosystem, frontend/core relationship) - README, .gitmodules
  - L2: 构建系统与运行方式 (CMake build, dependencies, Makefile, how to build/run) - CMakeLists.txt, Makefile, rime_config.h.in
  - L3: 目录结构与入口文件 (project layout, main entry, file map) - rime_main.c, rime.xml.in

**Intermediate layer (core modules and data flow):**
- Unit 2: 程序启动与 IBus 接入
  - L4: main 函数与信号/生命周期 (main, signal handling, ibus_rime_start/stop) - rime_main.c
  - L5: IBus 总线连接与工厂注册 (rime_with_ibus, bus, factory, engine registration) - rime_main.c, rime.xml.in
  - L6: librime 初始化与部署通知 (rime_api setup, initialize, maintenance, deploy, notify) - rime_main.c
- Unit 3: IBus 引擎对象与会话
  - L7: IBusRimeEngine GObject 类型定义与生命周期 (G_DEFINE_TYPE, class_init, init, destroy, session) - rime_engine.c, rime_engine.h
  - L8: 按键事件处理主链路 (process_key_event, find_session, _horizontal option, process_key) - rime_engine.c
  - L9: 引擎回调与生命周期事件 (focus_in/out, enable/disable, reset, property_activate) - rime_engine.c
- Unit 4: UI 渲染与候选词
  - L10: 状态栏属性与状态同步 (props, update_status, InputMode/Deploy/Sync) - rime_engine.c
  - L11: 预编辑文本与辅助文本渲染 (engine_update, preedit inline, preview/composition, auxiliary) - rime_engine.c
  - L12: 候选词表构建 (lookup table, candidates, labels, page up/down, candidate_clicked) - rime_engine.c

**Advanced layer (extension, packaging, architecture):**

input.rationale: ibus-rime 是一个体量小但交互面丰富的 C 项目：它是 Rime 输入法引擎在 Linux/IBus 下的「薄前端」，负责把 IBus 框架的 UI 原语与 librime 的 RimeApi 对接。学习路线按读者由浅入深的自然顺序设计：先建立项目定位与运行方式（U1），再顺着启动流程从 main() 一路追到 IBus 总线/工厂/引擎注册与 librime 初始化部署（U2）；随后进入核心——引擎 GObject 类型、会话与按键主链路、回调与状态栏操作（U3）；接着拆解前端最复杂的 UI 渲染三件事：综合更新与状态同步、预编辑/辅助文本、候选词表（U4）；再讲清 ibus_rime.yaml 配置如何驱动运行时行为（U5）；最后落到专家层——打包/静态构建/子模块，以及整体架构取舍与二次开发扩展点（U6）。每篇讲义只解决一个独立主题、引用真实源码文件、附带可操作的代码实践任务，依赖关系形成单向链路，确保初学者循序渐进。

units.title: 项目入门：定位、构建与源码地图

lectures.title: 项目定位与 Rime 生态
lectures.topic: 介绍 ibus-rime 是什么——它是 Rime 输入法引擎在 Linux/IBus 下的前端适配器，连接 IBus 桌面框架与 librime 核心引擎。
learning_goals: 理解 ibus-rime 在 Rime 生态中的定位（前端与核心分离）
了解输入法引擎与桌面输入法框架（IBus）的关系
明确本项目的运行平台、许可证与外部依赖来源
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README.md 与 .gitmodules，绘制一张图说明 ibus-rime、librime、plum、IBus 之间的依赖与调用方向，并指出谁是前端、谁是核心引擎。

lectures.title: 依赖、构建与运行
lectures.topic: 讲解如何用 CMake + Makefile 构建 ibus-rime，涉及 ibus-1.0、libnotify、librime、rime-data 等依赖，以及 rime_config.h.in 的配置生成。
learning_goals: 掌握构建依赖（cmake>=3.10、librime、libibus-1.0、libnotify、rime-data）
理解 CMakeLists.txt 如何用 pkg-config 发现依赖并生成 rime_config.h
学会用 Makefile 触发构建与安装
lectures.practice_task: 配置好依赖后执行 make 完成 build 目录构建，指出最终可执行文件 ibus-engine-rime 的生成路径，并说明 rime_config.h 中 IBUS_RIME_VERSION、IBUS_RIME_ICONS_DIR、IBUS_RIME_SHARED_DATA_DIR 的值来源。

lectures.title: 目录结构与源码地图
lectures.topic: 梳理仓库目录结构，建立三个核心 C 源文件与配置文件的职责地图，为后续阅读打基础。
learning_goals: 掌握仓库整体目录结构（源码、icons、package、子模块）
明确 rime_main.c / rime_engine.c / rime_settings.c 各自职责
理解 rime.xml.in 如何向 IBus 注册组件
minimal_modules: IBus 组件描述文件 rime.xml
入口/引擎/设置三层结构
lectures.practice_task: 制作一张「文件 → 职责」对照表，说明每个 C 文件负责什么，并标注 rime.xml.in 中 engine 的 name、layout、symbol 字段含义。

units.title: 启动流程与 IBus 接入

lectures.title: main 入口与进程生命周期
lectures.topic: 从 main() 出发，讲解信号处理（SIGTERM/SIGINT）、rime_get_api 获取核心 API、以及 ibus_rime_start/stop 的生命周期作用。
learning_goals: 理解 main 函数的启动顺序
掌握信号回调如何触发 ibus_quit 优雅退出
理解 ibus_rime_start/stop 与 librime initialize/finalize 的对应关系
lectures.practice_task: 在 rime_main.c 中标注从 main() 到 ibus_main() 的完整调用链，并解释 SIGTERM 到来时程序如何安全退出 librime。

lectures.title: IBus 总线、工厂与引擎注册
lectures.topic: 深入 rime_with_ibus()，讲解 IBus 总线连接、IBusFactory 创建、注册 IBUS_TYPE_RIME_ENGINE 引擎类型，以及请求 bus name 的过程。
learning_goals: 理解 ibus_init/ibus_bus_new/ibus_bus_is_connected 的连接建立
掌握 ibus_factory_new/add_engine/request_name 的注册流程
理解 disconnect 信号回调的作用
lectures.practice_task: 解释为何需要 g_object_ref_sink，并说明 ibus_bus_request_name 失败时为何直接 exit(1)；对照 rime.xml.in 说明 engine name 与代码中 add_engine 的对应关系。

lectures.title: librime 初始化、部署与通知
lectures.topic: 讲解 librime 的 setup/initialize/start_maintenance/deploy_config_file 流程，以及通过 libnotify 向用户展示部署状态通知。
learning_goals: 理解 RimeTraits（shared/user data dir、distribution 信息）的填充
掌握 maintenance 与 deploy ibus_rime.yaml 的意义
理解 notification_handler 如何将 librime 的 deploy 消息转成桌面通知
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪 notification_handler 中 deploy/success 分支，说明它为何在部署成功后调用 ibus_rime_load_settings，并描述 ~/.config/ibus/rime 用户目录的创建时机。

lectures.title: IBusRimeEngine 类型与生命周期
lectures.topic: 讲解 IBusRimeEngine 这个 GObject 子类的定义、G_DEFINE_TYPE 宏、class_init/init/destroy 三件套，以及它持有的 session/status/table/props 成员。
learning_goals: 理解 GObject 类型注册机制（G_DEFINE_TYPE、get_type）
掌握 class_init 中如何挂载 IBusEngineClass 虚函数
理解 init/destroy 中的资源分配与释放
lectures.practice_task: 列出 class_init 中挂载的所有虚函数，并解释 destroy 函数为何要先释放 session、status、table、props 再调用父类 destroy。

lectures.title: 会话管理与按键处理主链路
lectures.topic: 讲解 Rime 会话的创建/查找/销毁，以及 process_key_event 的核心流程：过滤 super 修饰键、同步 _horizontal 选项、调用 librime process_key、再触发 UI 更新。
learning_goals: 理解 RimeSessionId 的生命周期（create/find/destroy_session）
掌握 process_key_event 的修饰键过滤与按键转发
理解 _horizontal 选项如何与候选表方向联动
lectures.practice_task: 在 process_key_event 中标注按键从 IBus 进入到 librime 的完整路径，并解释为何在 process_key 前要先设置 _horizontal 选项（对照最近的 arrow key orientation 修复）。

lectures.title: 引擎回调与状态栏操作
lectures.topic: 讲解 focus_in/out、enable/disable、reset 等生命周期回调，以及 property_activate 如何处理 InputMode/Deploy/Sync 三个状态栏按钮。
learning_goals: 理解各引擎回调的职责（focus_in 注册属性、disable 销毁会话、reset 清空候选）
掌握 property_activate 中 deploy（重启 librime）、sync（sync_user_data）、InputMode（切换 ascii_mode）的处理
理解状态栏三个按钮与对应 librime 操作的关系
minimal_modules: focus_in / focus_out / reset / enable / disable 回调
lectures.practice_task: 说明点击「部署」按钮时 ibus_rime_stop + ibus_rime_start(TRUE) 的作用，并解释「同步」按钮调用 sync_user_data 与维护线程的关系（参考源码注释）。

lectures.title: 综合更新函数与状态同步
lectures.topic: 以 ibus_rime_engine_update 为核心，讲解它如何依次拉取 RimeStatus/RimeCommit/RimeContext，并把状态变化同步到状态栏图标与提交文本。
learning_goals: 理解 engine_update 的三段式更新（status、commit、context）
掌握 ibus_rime_update_status 的去重与图标/标签切换逻辑
理解 get_commit 提交文本的时机
lectures.practice_task: 跟踪 update_status 中的判断分支，说明在 disabled、ascii、中文三种模式下状态栏分别显示什么图标与符号，并解释去重 return 的条件。

lectures.title: 预编辑与辅助文本渲染
lectures.topic: 讲解根据 preedit_style（preview/composition）与 cursor_type（insert/select）两种模式，如何构造内联预编辑文本与辅助文本，并应用下划线/颜色属性。
learning_goals: 理解 embed_preedit 与两种 preedit_style 的渲染差异
掌握 cursor_type 对光标位置的影响
理解 has_highlighted_span 下颜色高亮（color_scheme）的应用方式
minimal_modules: IBusText 属性（下划线/前景/背景）
lectures.practice_task: 对比 PREEDIT_STYLE_PREVIEW 与 PREEDIT_STYLE_COMPOSITION 两个分支，写出它们在 inline_text 来源、光标位置、auxiliary_text 显示上的差异表。

lectures.title: 候选词列表渲染
lectures.topic: 讲解如何把 librime 的 RimeContext.menu 翻译成 IBusLookupTable，包括候选词与注释拼接、序号标签、分页占位、方向与光标定位。
learning_goals: 理解 IBusLookupTable 的清空、追加候选、设置标签流程
掌握候选注释着色与三种 label 来源的优先级
理解翻页占位候选与 cursor_pos 的计算逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 在候选表构建循环中标注三类 label 的优先级判断，并解释为何在最后一页时需要先插入 page_size 个空候选再设置 cursor_pos。

lectures.title: ibus_rime.yaml 与运行时配置加载
lectures.topic: 讲解 rime_settings.c 如何通过 librime 的 config API 读取 ibus_rime.yaml，解析 style 下的 inline_preedit/preedit_style/cursor_type/horizontal/color_scheme 等选项，并维护全局 g_ibus_rime_settings。
learning_goals: 理解 config_open/config_get_bool/config_get_cstring/config_close 的配置读取流程
掌握各 style 选项到全局设置结构的映射
理解 preset_color_schemes 与 select_color_scheme 的颜色方案机制
lectures.practice_task: 修改本地 ibus_rime.yaml 把 color_scheme 改为 aqua 并重新部署，用日志或调试确认 g_ibus_rime_settings.color_scheme 指向 aqua 定义；再尝试新增一个 style 选项并打通加载链路。

lectures.title: 打包、静态构建与子模块
lectures.topic: 讲解 package/ 下的打包脚本、BUILD_STATIC 静态构建（静态链接 boost/leveldb/opencc 等）、以及 librime/plum 子模块和 FindRimeData 的数据目录定位。
learning_goals: 理解 make-package/make-binpkg-static/binpkg-install 的打包流程
掌握静态构建依赖与 RIME_DEPS 的组成
理解子模块（librime/plum）的作用与 FindRimeData 的目录探测逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 说明 make-binpkg-static 依次构建 librime、plum(brise)、ibus-rime 的顺序，并解释 binpkg-install 中各 install 目标路径与 CMake install 规则的对应关系。

lectures.title: 架构取舍与二次开发
lectures.topic: 从整体架构出发，分析 ibus-rime 作为「薄前端」的设计取舍（稳定的 librime RimeApi 边界、GObject 适配 IBus、配置驱动 UI），并给出新增 style 选项、状态栏按钮、按键处理等扩展点的二次开发思路。
learning_goals: 理解前端/核心分离架构与 RimeApi 作为稳定边界的意义
掌握新增配置项、状态栏按钮、按键处理的完整改造路径
理解 GObject + IBus 虚函数的扩展模式
lectures.practice_task: 设计并实现一个小扩展：在 ibus_rime.yaml 新增一个 style 选项，在 rime_settings.c 解析它，并在 rime_engine.c 的候选表构建处使用它，画出从配置到生效的完整改造流程图。

lectures.practice_task: 对比 PREEDIT_STYLE_PREVIEW 与 PREEDIT_STYLE_COMPOSITION 两个分支，写出它们在 inline_text 来源、光标位置、auxiliary_text 显示上的差异表。

lectures.title: 候选词列表渲染
lectures.topic: 讲解如何把 librime 的 RimeContext.menu 翻译成 IBusLookupTable，包括候选词与注释拼接、序号标签、分页占位、方向与光标定位。
learning_goals: 理解 IBusLookupTable 的清空、追加候选、设置标签流程
掌握候选注释着色与三种 label 来源的优先级
理解翻页占位候选与 cursor_pos 的计算逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 在候选表构建循环中标注三类 label 的优先级判断，并解释为何在最后一页时需要先插入 page_size 个空候选再设置 cursor_pos。

lectures.title: ibus_rime.yaml 与运行时配置加载
lectures.topic: 讲解 rime_settings.c 如何通过 librime 的 config API 读取 ibus_rime.yaml，解析 style 下的 inline_preedit/preedit_style/cursor_type/horizontal/color_scheme 等选项，并维护全局 g_ibus_rime_settings。
learning_goals: 理解 config_open/config_get_bool/config_get_cstring/config_close 的配置读取流程
掌握各 style 选项到全局设置结构的映射
理解 preset_color_schemes 与 select_color_scheme 的颜色方案机制
lectures.practice_task: 修改本地 ibus_rime.yaml 把 color_scheme 改为 aqua 并重新部署，用日志或调试确认 g_ibus_rime_settings.color_scheme 指向 aqua 定义；再尝试新增一个 style 选项并打通加载链路。

lectures.title: 打包、静态构建与子模块
lectures.topic: 讲解 package/ 下的打包脚本、BUILD_STATIC 静态构建（静态链接 boost/leveldb/opencc 等）、以及 librime/plum 子模块和 FindRimeData 的数据目录定位。
learning_goals: 理解 make-package/make-binpkg-static/binpkg-install 的打包流程
掌握静态构建依赖与 RIME_DEPS 的组成
理解子模块（librime/plum）的作用与 FindRimeData 的目录探测逻辑
lectures.practice_task: 说明 make-binpkg-static 依次构建 librime、plum(brise)、ibus-rime 的顺序，并解释 binpkg-install 中各 install 目标路径与 CMake install 规则的对应关系。

lectures.title: 架构取舍与二次开发
lectures.topic: 从整体架构出发，分析 ibus-rime 作为「薄前端」的设计取舍（稳定的 librime RimeApi 边界、GObject 适配 IBus、配置驱动 UI），并给出新增 style 选项、状态栏按钮、按键处理等扩展点的二次开发思路。
learning_goals: 理解前端/核心分离架构与 RimeApi 作为稳定边界的意义
掌握新增配置项、状态栏按钮、按键处理的完整改造路径
理解 GObject + IBus 虚函数的扩展模式
lectures.practice_task: 设计并实现一个小扩展：在 ibus_rime.yaml 新增一个 style 选项，在 rime_settings.c 解析它，并在 rime_engine.c 的候选表构建处使用它，画出从配置到生效的完整改造流程图。
